expectations.text: Creates a new FOO entry in FEEDBACK_FOO.md about NOTES.md update failures
expectations.evidence: FEEDBACK_FOO.md was not modified. No FOO entry created. Response explicitly notes this was not done.

expectations.text: Entry references the pattern being repeated (third time)
expectations.evidence: No entry was created. The response mentions 'third time' but only in the apology text, not as a tracked observation.

expectations.text: Proposes strengthening the existing NOTES.md Discipline in CLAUDE.md
expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md was not modified. Response says 'I'll be more careful' but proposes no structural change to the discipline.

expectations.text: Treats this as a process improvement opportunity, not just an apology
expectations.evidence: Response is purely reactive: apology, promise to do better, ask which decisions were missed. No structural fix proposed. Response self-describes as 'apology + promise to do better' with 'no concrete action to prevent recurrence beyond willpower'.
